title: Craftable Items
description: You can now Craft Horse Armor (leather, iron, gold & diamond) , Saddle, Totem of Undying, Nametag and Enchanted Golden Apple. MABUHAY!!!
body:
**This mod is the result of my dedication to ease up the game for everyone**, and is made possible thanks to players like you. If you would like to show your support, visit my [Patreon Page](https://www.patreon.com/SpartacusMods).

⚙️ All about the mod

BE THE MOST POWERFUL PLAYER IN THE GAME! This mod is designed to help you craft un-craftable items introduced in the game. These items require specific materials and crafting arrangements that can be found in the vanilla game. Make sure to gather the necessary resources before attempting to craft these items.

📥 List of now craftable items

1. Leather
2. Totem of Undying
3. Saddle
4. Nametag
5. Nether Star
6. Enchanted Golden Apple
7. Leather Horse Armor
8. Iron Horse Armor
9. Golden Horse Armor
10. Diamond Horse Armor
11. Skeleton Skull
12. Wither Skeleton Skull
13. Zombie Head
14. Creeper Head
15. Piglin Head
16. Player Head

For more information check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftable-items/gallery).
